metadata.short_desc: Helps an AI chatbot learn conversation style, group jargon, social context, and persona evolution.
metadata.desc: SELF LEARNING lets an AI chatbot learn conversation style, understand group jargon, manage social relationships and affection, and evolve its persona for more natural conversations. Back up persona data manually before use.

Dependency_Install_Guide.hint: Dependencies are not installed automatically during plugin installation or startup. Open the plugin WebUI Dashboard full settings and manually install basic or full capability dependencies.

dependency_install_entry.hint: Basic dependencies cover persona review, jargon learning, expression learning, and WebUI features. Full dependencies add graph, monitoring, external database, LightRAG, Mem0, and other complete capabilities.

Self_Learning_Basic.hint: Controls the plugin's basic learning behavior.

enable_message_capture.hint: Capture user messages for learning. When disabled, the plugin stops collecting new messages.

enable_auto_learning.hint: Run scheduled automatic learning. When disabled, learning must be triggered manually.

enable_realtime_learning.hint: Filter and process messages as they arrive. This increases real-time load.

enable_jargon_learning.hint: Enable jargon pre-filtering, mining, and context capabilities.

enable_style_learning.hint: Enable automatic style learning, expression patterns, and related learning batches.

enable_realtime_llm_filter.hint: Use an LLM to filter every real-time message. Disable this to reduce LLM call frequency.

enable_web_interface.hint: Enable the Web UI for viewing and managing learning data.

web_interface_port.hint: Access port for the Web management UI.

web_interface_host.hint: Bind address for the Web management UI. 0.0.0.0 listens on all interfaces; 127.0.0.1 is local only.

Target_Settings.hint: Configure whose messages should be learned.

target_qq_list.hint: Default full learning: leave empty, blank, or enter all/*/全部/全量 to learn all non-blacklisted messages. You can also enter a QQ ID or group_ group-id value as a whitelist.

target_blacklist.hint: Messages from blacklisted members are not learned. Empty means no blacklist. Supports QQ IDs and group_ group-id values.

current_persona_name.hint: The plugin learns and optimizes the conversation style for this persona. Empty or default follows the current AstrBot persona; a specific ID must exist in persona settings.

Model_Configuration.hint: Configure AI model providers used for filtering, refinement, and reinforcement learning.

filter_provider_id.hint: Provider used for message filtering. Fast and low-cost models such as gpt-4o-mini are recommended.

refine_provider_id.hint: Provider used for deep analysis and conversation style refinement. Stronger models such as gpt-4o are recommended.

reinforce_provider_id.hint: Provider used for reinforcement learning. A capable model is recommended.

min_messages_for_learning.hint: Minimum number of messages required before learning starts.

max_messages_per_batch.hint: Maximum messages processed in a single learning run to avoid oversized batches.

expression_learning_trigger_messages.hint: How many new raw messages per group trigger expression learning. Increase this to reduce filter/analysis model calls.

topic_detection_interval_messages.hint: How many new messages per group trigger one LLM topic detection. Increase this to reduce filter model calls.

message_min_length.hint: Minimum character length of messages included in learning.

message_max_length.hint: Maximum character length of messages included in learning.

confidence_threshold.hint: Message filter confidence threshold from 0 to 1. Higher values are stricter.

style_analysis_batch_size.hint: Number of messages processed in one style analysis run.

style_update_threshold.hint: Confidence threshold from 0 to 1 for triggering persona style updates.

debug_mode.hint: Enable function-level performance monitoring and automatically use debug logs when no log level is specified.

log_level.hint: Controls plugin log verbosity in AstrBot logs. error is minimal; debug is most verbose.

save_raw_messages.hint: Whether to save unprocessed raw messages for analysis.

auto_backup_interval_days.hint: Learning data auto-backup interval in days. 0 disables it.

auto_apply_approved_persona.description: Auto-apply approved reviews to the default persona
auto_apply_approved_persona.hint: Dangerous feature. After persona review approval, apply content directly to the currently used default persona instead of creating a new persona copy. This overwrites the default persona system prompt and is irreversible unless restored from backup. Strongly enable persona auto-backup when using this.

enable_ml_analysis.hint: Enable scikit-learn for text clustering and behavior analysis.

max_ml_sample_size.hint: Maximum sample count for machine learning analysis to control resource usage.

ml_cache_timeout_hours.hint: Cache lifetime for machine learning analysis results.

Persona_Backup_Settings.hint: Persona data backup and restore configuration.

auto_backup_enabled.hint: Create backups automatically before persona updates.

max_backups_per_group.hint: Maximum backups retained for each group.

Goal_Driven_Chat_Settings.hint: Intelligent conversation goal management with dynamic goal detection and stage planning.

enable_goal_driven_chat.hint: Enable the intelligent conversation goal system. It detects conversation goals and dynamically adjusts reply strategy.

goal_session_timeout_hours.hint: Conversation goal session timeout. Inactive sessions past this time are cleaned automatically.

goal_auto_detect.hint: Use an LLM to analyze user messages and detect conversation goal type. When disabled, the default casual chat mode is used.

goal_max_conversation_history.hint: Maximum conversation turns kept in a session. One user message plus one bot reply counts as one turn. Recommended: 20-40.

Affection_System_Settings.hint: User affection and bot mood management configuration.

enable_affection_system.hint: Enable user affection and emotional response system.

max_total_affection.hint: Maximum total affection value the bot can hold across all users.

max_user_affection.hint: Maximum affection a single user can receive.

affection_decay_rate.hint: Decay ratio used during affection redistribution, from 0 to 1.

daily_mood_change.hint: Randomly change the bot's mood every day.

mood_affect_affection.hint: Whether the current mood affects the magnitude of affection changes.

enable_daily_mood.hint: Enable the daily random mood system.

enable_startup_random_mood.hint: Set a random initial mood for active groups when the plugin starts.

mood_change_hour.hint: Hour of day for mood updates, from 0 to 23.

mood_persistence_hours.hint: How many hours each mood state persists.

Social_Context_Settings.hint: Controls injection of social relationships, affection, and mood into LLM prompts.

enable_social_context_injection.hint: Inject user social relationships, affection, and mood information into LLM prompts.

include_social_relations.hint: Include the user's social relationship network information in the prompt.

include_affection_info.hint: Include affection information for the user in the prompt.

include_mood_info.hint: Include the bot's current mood state in the prompt.

expression_patterns_hours.hint: How many recent hours of learned expression style features are injected into the prompt. Default is 24 hours; use 168 for one week.

context_injection_position.hint: Where to inject social context into the prompt. Options: start or end.

Storage_Settings.hint: Customize the plugin data storage location.

data_dir.hint: Root directory for plugin data. Defaults to plugin_data/astrbot_plugin_self_learning under the AstrBot data directory; absolute paths are allowed.

Database_Settings.hint: Configure database type and connection parameters. PostgreSQL is the default; SQLite and MySQL are compatible explicit backends.

db_type.hint: Enter postgresql, pgsql, sqlite, or mysql. PostgreSQL is the default; startup creates database/schema before syncing ORM tables. Use sqlite explicitly when PostgreSQL is unavailable on a single machine.

mysql_host.hint: IP address or domain of the MySQL server, such as localhost or 192.168.1.100. Required only when db_type is mysql.

mysql_port.hint: MySQL server port, usually 3306. Required only when db_type is mysql.

mysql_user.hint: MySQL database username, such as root or astrbot. Required only when db_type is mysql.

mysql_password.hint: MySQL database password. Required only when db_type is mysql.

mysql_database.hint: MySQL database name. The plugin can automatically create the database and tables.

postgresql_host.hint: IP address or domain of the PostgreSQL server. Required only when db_type is postgresql.

postgresql_port.hint: PostgreSQL server port, usually 5432. Required only when db_type is postgresql.

postgresql_user.hint: PostgreSQL database username, such as postgres or astrbot. Required only when db_type is postgresql.

postgresql_password.hint: PostgreSQL database password. Required only when db_type is postgresql.

postgresql_database.hint: PostgreSQL database name. The plugin will try to create the database and tables automatically.

postgresql_schema.hint: PostgreSQL schema name. Default is public; other names are created and used automatically.

max_connections.hint: Maximum database connection pool size. Increase for high concurrency.

min_connections.hint: Minimum database connection pool size to keep warm connections available.

API_Settings.hint: Security configuration for external API endpoints.

api_key.hint: Access key for external API endpoints. Leave empty to disable key authentication. A strong password is recommended.

enable_api_auth.hint: Enable API key authentication. When disabled, anyone can access external API endpoints.

Repository_Settings.hint: Configure default limits and parameters for SQLAlchemy Repository data access.

default_review_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching pending persona/style learning review records.

default_pattern_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching expression patterns.

default_memory_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching memory records.

default_affection_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching affection interaction records.

default_social_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching social relationship records.

default_psychological_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching psychological state records.

max_interaction_batch_size.hint: Maximum number of interaction records processed in one batch to avoid oversized operations.

top_patterns_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching the highest-weight expression patterns.

recent_interactions_limit.hint: Default limit when fetching recent interaction records.

trend_analysis_days.hint: Default day range queried for trend analysis.

Integration_Settings.hint: Coordinate with specialized plugins: delegate memory to LivingMemory and reply decisions/generation to Group Chat Plus.

delegate_memory_to_livingmemory.hint: When LivingMemory is loaded, this plugin no longer writes or injects local long-term memory, avoiding double-memory contamination.

livingmemory_plugin_name.hint: Used to detect whether the LivingMemory plugin is loaded. Usually keep the default.

disable_local_memory_when_delegated.hint: When enabled, local long-term memory is disabled only if LivingMemory is detected; otherwise local fallback remains available.

delegate_reply_to_group_chat_plus.description: Delegate replies to Group Chat Plus
delegate_reply_to_group_chat_plus.hint: When Group Chat Plus is loaded, this plugin no longer handles reply decisions or generation and only enhances learning context.

group_chat_plus_plugin_name.hint: Used to detect whether the Group Chat Plus plugin is loaded. Usually keep the default.

disable_local_reply_when_delegated.hint: When enabled, the local reply system is disabled only if Group Chat Plus is detected; otherwise compatible fallback remains available.

V2_Architecture_Settings.hint: Advanced features: embedding vectorization, reranker sorting, knowledge engine, and memory engine.

embedding_provider_id.hint: Enter the full Embedding provider ID, such as 'openai/text-embedding-3-large'. Create an Embedding provider in AstrBot Provider management first, then enter its ID here. The format is usually 'source/model'.

rerank_provider_id.hint: Enter the full Reranker provider ID, such as 'openai/qwen3-rerank'. Create a Reranker provider in AstrBot Provider management first, then enter its ID here. The format is usually 'source/model'.

rerank_top_k.hint: Number of Top-K results kept after reranking. Smaller values are more precise but may miss relevant results.

rerank_min_candidates.hint: Skip Reranker when the number of knowledge + memory candidate documents is below this threshold to save latency. Set to 0 to always rerank.

provider_retry_interval_seconds.hint: AstrBot provider registry may not be ready during cold start. The plugin retries binding Embedding/Reranker providers at this interval.

knowledge_engine.hint: Knowledge storage engine type. legacy uses the existing NetworkX implementation; lightrag uses LightRAG hybrid vector + graph retrieval and requires an Embedding provider.

lightrag_query_mode.hint: LightRAG retrieval mode. local uses entity-neighborhood retrieval with low latency; hybrid combines entity-neighborhood and global community aggregation for higher quality but slower results; naive is pure vector retrieval; global is global community only; mix is mixed mode.

memory_engine.hint: Memory management engine type. legacy uses the existing implementation; mem0 uses mem0 for automatic memory extraction and retrieval and requires an Embedding provider.

maibot.dbHint: Optional. If filled, this SQLite file is read first.
maibot.defaultGroupHint: Used when a MaiBot session cannot be mapped.
maibot.desc: Read MaiBot expressions, jargon, and A_memorix memory segments, then import them into this plugin's independent learning modules.
maibot.importCounts: Import: expression reviews {style} · jargon candidates {jargon} · memory reviews {memory}
maibot.memorixHint: Optional. Used to import memory segments.
maibot.missingPath: Enter a MaiBot project directory or main database path.
maibot.rootHint: For example C:\Users\zacza\Desktop\x\MaiBot; you can also enter only a database path.
maibot.title: MaiBot Learning Data Migration

qchat.defaultGroupHint: When empty, the group name from manifest.json is preferred.
qchat.desc: Read QQChatExporter V5 chunked-jsonl, train_data.json, TXT, or HTML records and write them into the raw message learning queue.
qchat.missingPath: Enter a QQ chat history path.
qchat.pathHint: Supports QCE export directories, chunks/*.jsonl, train_data.json, TXT, or HTML.
qchat.title: QQ Chat History Import
